user_query: You're my language tutor. Please read these files under input/ and build a personalized beginner Japanese lesson for travel: - input/learner_profile.json - input/vocab_topics.txt - input/priority_phrases.jsonl Deliverables (write to the specified paths): 1) output/lesson_plan.md — a 20-minute daily lesson tailored to the profile and topics. Include: - Sections labeled exactly: Warm-up, New content, Practice, Cool-down, Homework - A vocabulary builder with at least 6 items formatted per item as: [Japanese] — [romaji] — [English] followed by three lines: "Example sentence:", "Translation:", and "Memory hook:" - A short grammar pattern activity (show 3-4 examples, ask "What pattern do you notice?", then explain briefly) - A quiz with three distinct formats labeled: "Target → English", "English → Target", and "Fill in the blank" - Make sure at least one topic from input/vocab_topics.txt is clearly addressed and at least 3 phrases from input/priority_phrases.jsonl are included and translated (use Japanese script + romaji + English). 2) output/flashcards.jsonl — at least 12 JSON lines for spaced-repetition drills. Each line must be a valid JSON object with keys: type, front, back, transliteration. Use at least 3 distinct types chosen from: word_to_translation, translation_to_word, sentence_completion, phrase. Ensure at least 2 front fields match vocabulary headwords you introduced in output/lesson_plan.md. 3) output/conversation.md — a role-play script set in a Tokyo restaurant for ordering food at a beginner-friendly level. Start with a "Scene:" line mentioning ordering in Tokyo. Then at least 8 alternating turns labeled "You:" and "Server:" where each turn contains: the Japanese line, romaji in parentheses, and an English translation after a dash. After the dialogue, add a "Recap" section with subheadings: Corrections, New vocabulary, Cultural notes. Include at least 3 of the priority phrases adapted into the dialogue where appropriate. 4) output/cultural_tips.md — at least 3 concise bullet points with practical tips on politeness levels and dining etiquette in Japan. General requirements: - Use native Japanese script throughout with romaji transliteration and English translation for all examples and cards - Align everything to a traveler beginner profile and the provided topics and phrases - Keep file paths exactly as specified under output/.
